title.en: China-to-Mali Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入马里：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入馬里：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Mali AMANORM conformity requirements, CREE (Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et de l'Eau) licensing, EDM-SA grid-connection requirements, AMADER rural electrification quality standards, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings (Mali nominally follows ECOWAS 220 V / 380 V), IEC TS 62257 off-grid quality standards, and donor/lender procurement specifications — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与马里AMANORM合格评定要求、CREE（电力与水务监管委员会）许可、EDM-SA并网要求、AMADER农村电气化质量标准、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数（马里名义上遵循ECOWAS 220 V / 380 V）、IEC TS 62257离网质量标准及捐助方/贷款方采购规格——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與馬里AMANORM合格評定要求、CREE（電力與水務監管委員會）許可、EDM-SA併網要求、AMADER農村電氣化質量標準、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數（馬里名義上遵循ECOWAS 220 V / 380 V）、IEC TS 62257離網質量標準及捐助方/貸款方採購規格——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, AMANORM conformity scope determination, CREE licensing decision, EDM-SA grid-connection approval, AMADER programme eligibility determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Mali AMANORM technical regulations, CREE licensing conditions, EDM-SA grid-connection requirements, AMADER rural electrification quality requirements, donor and lender procurement specifications (World Bank, AfDB, EU, etc.), and applicable IEC standards with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Mali's Sahel operating environment — extreme heat, dust, and humidity variation — imposes derating and environmental protection requirements that must be addressed in equipment specifications regardless of standards compliance.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、AMANORM合格评定范围裁定、CREE许可决定、EDM-SA并网批准、AMADER计划资格裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行马里AMANORM技术法规、CREE许可条件、EDM-SA并网要求、AMADER农村电气化质量要求、捐助方和贷款方采购规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟等）及适用IEC标准。马里萨赫勒地区运营环境——极端高温、沙尘及湿度变化——对设备规格提出了降额和环境防护要求，无论标准合规情况如何均须予以满足。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、AMANORM合格評定範圍裁定、CREE許可決定、EDM-SA併網批准、AMADER計畫資格裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬里AMANORM技術法規、CREE許可條件、EDM-SA併網要求、AMADER農村電氣化質量要求、捐助方和貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟等）及適用IEC標準。馬里薩赫勒地區運營環境——極端高溫、沙塵及濕度變化——對設備規格提出了降額和環境防護要求，無論標準合規情況如何均須予以滿足。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Mali, the key practical gaps are: (1) AMANORM conformity — Mali's standards body adopts IEC standards, and Chinese GB/T certificates are not automatically accepted; (2) CREE licensing — grid-tied projects above a threshold capacity require a CREE generation licence or concession, and inverter equipment must meet CREE and EDM-SA technical requirements; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, as Chinese GB/T 37408 is not accepted as equivalent by Mali/donor project owners; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance for grid-tied inverters; (5) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC evidence; (6) for off-grid and mini-grid applications serving AMADER rural electrification programmes, IEC TS 62257 series quality standards and donor/lender (World Bank, AfDB, EU) procurement specifications are typically binding; and (7) Sahel environmental derating — extreme ambient temperatures (up to 45–50 °C), dust (IEC 60721-3 class 4S), and humidity require verified IP and thermal performance beyond typical Chinese domestic test conditions. China GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964, and NB/T 32004 baselines do not satisfy AMANORM/CREE/EDM-SA or donor procurement requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口马里时，主要实际差距包括：（1）AMANORM合格评定——马里标准机构采用IEC标准，中国GB/T证书不被自动接受；（2）CREE许可——超过一定容量门槛的并网项目须取得CREE发电许可或特许权，逆变器设备须符合CREE和EDM-SA技术要求；（3）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据，马里/捐助方项目业主不接受中国GB/T 37408作为等效依据；（4）并网逆变器的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC证据；（6）对于服务于AMADER农村电气化计划的离网和微电网应用，IEC TS 62257系列质量标准及捐助方/贷款方（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟）采购规格通常具有约束力；（7）萨赫勒环境降额——极端环境温度（高达45–50 °C）、沙尘（IEC 60721-3 4S类）和湿度要求经验证的IP防护等级和热性能，超出中国国内典型测试条件。中国GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004基准不满足AMANORM/CREE/EDM-SA或捐助方采购要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口馬里時，主要實際差距包括：（1）AMANORM合格評定——馬里標準機構採用IEC標準，中國GB/T證書不被自動接受；（2）CREE許可——超過一定容量門檻的併網項目須取得CREE發電許可或特許權，逆變器設備須符合CREE和EDM-SA技術要求；（3）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據，馬里/捐助方項目業主不接受中國GB/T 37408作為等效依據；（4）併網逆變器的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC證據；（6）對於服務於AMADER農村電氣化計畫的離網和微電網應用，IEC TS 62257系列質量標準及捐助方/貸款方（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟）採購規格通常具有約束力；（7）薩赫勒環境降額——極端環境溫度（高達45–50 °C）、沙塵（IEC 60721-3 4S類）和濕度要求經驗證的IP防護等級和熱性能，超出中國國內典型測試條件。中國GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004基準不滿足AMANORM/CREE/EDM-SA或捐助方採購要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
